title: echo(): unwrap_or(u16::MAX) instead of BadArgs on overflow
description: client.rs: rcv_len uses unwrap_or(u16::MAX) when buf.len() > u16::MAX, silently clamping to 65535 instead of returning BadArgs. Every other FFI method (aes_gcm_encrypt, she_enc_ecb, etc.) returns BadArgs on overflow. This inconsistency means a caller passing a large buffer gets truncated output with no error. Fix: u16::try_from(buf.len()).map_err(|_| Error::BadArgs { msg: 'echo: buf exceeds u16::MAX bytes' })
